introductionSomali: Unit-kan wuxuu barayaa future-time expressions, going to, Present Continuous arrangements, will, possibility, hopes, goals, action plans, calendars, appointments, first conditional, time clauses iyo qoraallada qorshaha mustaqbalka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Weedhaha waqtiga mustaqbalka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Weedhaha waqtiga mustaqbalka.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: future-plans word or phrase • Future-Time Expressions • neutral
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The fictional calendar uses “Tomorrow” to show exactly when the next learning activity will happen.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Kalandarka mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu “Tomorrow” u adeegsadaa inuu muujiyo goorta hawsha waxbarasho ee xigta dhacdo.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Topic: Weedhaha waqtiga mustaqbalka. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa common collocation iyo future-plans context dabiici ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Kala saar plan, arrangement iyo prediction adigoo eegaya context-ka example-ka.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

negativeExamples.english: The example learner is not going to change the confirmed plan tonight.
negativeExamples.somali: Ardayga tusaalaha ahi caawa ma beddelayo qorshaha la xaqiijiyay.

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.
negativeExamples.somali: Kulanka mala-awaalka ahi ma dhammaan doono kahor afarta.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Weedhaha waqtiga mustaqbalka • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The fictional calendar uses “Tomorrow” to show exactly when the next learning activity will happen.
lines.somali: Kalandarka mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu “Tomorrow” u adeegsadaa inuu muujiyo goorta hawsha waxbarasho ee xigta dhacdo.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Weedhaha waqtiga mustaqbalka • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka qorshayaasha • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Our plan is to complete the registration forms before Friday afternoon.
lines.somali: Qorshahayagu waa inaan foomamka diiwaangelinta dhammaystirno kahor Jimcaha galab.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka qorshayaasha • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Be Going To — Positive Forms grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Going To ee jumladaha xaqiijinta
grammar.explanationSomali: Be going to + base verb waxaa loo isticmaalaa qorshe ama intention hore loo sameeyay.
grammar.rule: Be going to + base verb waxaa loo isticmaalaa qorshe ama intention hore loo sameeyay.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + am/is/are + going to + base verb.

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.
negativeExamples.somali: Kulanka mala-awaalka ahi ma dhammaan doono kahor afarta.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Going To ee jumladaha xaqiijinta • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The example sentence uses “I am going to” before a base verb to describe a previously decided study plan.
lines.somali: Jumladda tusaalaha ahi waxay “I am going to” kahor dhigaysaa base verb si ay u sharaxdo qorshe waxbarasho oo hore.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Going To ee jumladaha xaqiijinta • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee going-to positive, negative iyo question adigoo adeegsanaya qorshe weekend oo tusaale ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Going To ee jumladaha xaqiijinta, adigoo adeegsanaya qorshe mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Going To ee jumladaha xaqiijinta, grammar-keeda, common collocations iyo sida loogu adeegsado qorshe mustaqbal oo cad.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Diidmada iyo su’aalaha Going To waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Diidmada iyo su’aalaha Going To.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Going To — Negative and Questions grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Diidmada iyo su’aalaha Going To
grammar.explanationSomali: Negative-ku wuxuu not ka dambeeyaa am/is/are; su’aashuna am/is/are ayay ku bilaabataa.
grammar.rule: Negative-ku wuxuu not ka dambeeyaa am/is/are; su’aashuna am/is/are ayay ku bilaabataa.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + be + not + going to + verb; Be + subject + going to + verb?

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Diidmada iyo su’aalaha Going To • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The example sentence uses “Am not going to” before a base verb to describe a previously decided study plan.
lines.somali: Jumladda tusaalaha ahi waxay “Am not going to” kahor dhigaysaa base verb si ay u sharaxdo qorshe waxbarasho oo hore.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Diidmada iyo su’aalaha Going To • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Diidmada iyo su’aalaha Going To, kuna dar future time, reason iyo confirmed detail.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Diidmada iyo su’aalaha Going To, adigoo adeegsanaya qorshe mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Diidmada iyo su’aalaha Going To, grammar-keeda, common collocations iyo sida loogu adeegsado qorshe mustaqbal oo cad.

lessons.titleSomali: Present Continuous iyo qorshe la xaqiijiyay
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Present Continuous iyo qorshe la xaqiijiyay waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Present Continuous iyo qorshe la xaqiijiyay.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Present Continuous iyo qorshe la xaqiijiyay
grammar.explanationSomali: Present Continuous wuxuu muujinayaa arrangement leh waqti, meel ama qof la xaqiijiyay.
grammar.rule: Present Continuous wuxuu muujinayaa arrangement leh waqti, meel ama qof la xaqiijiyay.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + am/is/are + verb-ing + confirmed future detail.

positiveExamples.english: The dialogue uses “Meeting the manager” for a future arrangement with a confirmed time and place.
positiveExamples.somali: Wada hadalku wuxuu “Meeting the manager” u adeegsadaa arrangement mustaqbal oo leh waqti iyo goob la xaqiijiyay.

positiveExamples.english: The dialogue uses “Arriving” for a future arrangement with a confirmed time and place.

negativeExamples.english: The example learner is not going to change the confirmed plan tonight.

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Present Continuous iyo qorshe la xaqiijiyay • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The dialogue uses “Meeting the manager” for a future arrangement with a confirmed time and place.
lines.somali: Wada hadalku wuxuu “Meeting the manager” u adeegsadaa arrangement mustaqbal oo leh waqti iyo goob la xaqiijiyay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Present Continuous iyo qorshe la xaqiijiyay • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.titleSomali: Farqiga Going To iyo Present Continuous
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Farqiga Going To iyo Present Continuous waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Farqiga Going To iyo Present Continuous.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Farqiga Going To iyo Present Continuous • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The dialogue uses “General plan” for a future arrangement with a confirmed time and place.
lines.somali: Wada hadalku wuxuu “General plan” u adeegsadaa arrangement mustaqbal oo leh waqti iyo goob la xaqiijiyay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Farqiga Going To iyo Present Continuous • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Will iyo saadaalaha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Will iyo saadaalaha.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Will + base verb wuxuu halkan muujinayaa saadaal ama opinion mustaqbal.
grammar.rule: Will + base verb wuxuu halkan muujinayaa saadaal ama opinion mustaqbal.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + will/won’t + base verb; Will + subject + base verb?

questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

lessons.titleEnglish: Will for Instant Decisions and Offers
lessons.titleSomali: Will iyo go’aan degdeg ah ama caawimo
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Will iyo go’aan degdeg ah ama caawimo waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Will iyo go’aan degdeg ah ama caawimo.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Will for Instant Decisions and Offers grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Will iyo go’aan degdeg ah ama caawimo
grammar.explanationSomali: Will waxaa loo isticmaalaa go’aan la gaaray xilliga hadalka ama offer degdeg ah.
grammar.rule: Will waxaa loo isticmaalaa go’aan la gaaray xilliga hadalka ama offer degdeg ah.
grammar.sentenceStructure: I/We + will + base verb.

positiveExamples.english: The situation makes “I'll answer the phone” a natural instant decision, offer, promise, or future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladdu waxay “I'll answer the phone” ka dhigaysaa go’aan degdeg ah, caawimo, ballanqaad ama doorasho mustaqbal oo dabiici ah.

positiveExamples.english: The situation makes “I'll help you” a natural instant decision, offer, promise, or future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladdu waxay “I'll help you” ka dhigaysaa go’aan degdeg ah, caawimo, ballanqaad ama doorasho mustaqbal oo dabiici ah.

positiveExamples.english: The situation makes “I'll send the message now” a natural instant decision, offer, promise, or future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladdu waxay “I'll send the message now” ka dhigaysaa go’aan degdeg ah, caawimo, ballanqaad ama doorasho mustaqbal oo dabiici ah.

positiveExamples.english: The situation makes “I'll check the schedule” a natural instant decision, offer, promise, or future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladdu waxay “I'll check the schedule” ka dhigaysaa go’aan degdeg ah, caawimo, ballanqaad ama doorasho mustaqbal oo dabiici ah.

positiveExamples.english: The situation makes “I'll carry that bag” a natural instant decision, offer, promise, or future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladdu waxay “I'll carry that bag” ka dhigaysaa go’aan degdeg ah, caawimo, ballanqaad ama doorasho mustaqbal oo dabiici ah.

positiveExamples.english: The situation makes “We'll wait for you” a natural instant decision, offer, promise, or future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladdu waxay “We'll wait for you” ka dhigaysaa go’aan degdeg ah, caawimo, ballanqaad ama doorasho mustaqbal oo dabiici ah.

positiveExamples.english: The situation makes “Instant decision” a natural instant decision, offer, promise, or future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladdu waxay “Instant decision” ka dhigaysaa go’aan degdeg ah, caawimo, ballanqaad ama doorasho mustaqbal oo dabiici ah.

positiveExamples.english: The situation makes “Offer” a natural instant decision, offer, promise, or future choice.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladdu waxay “Offer” ka dhigaysaa go’aan degdeg ah, caawimo, ballanqaad ama doorasho mustaqbal oo dabiici ah.

negativeExamples.english: The example learner is not going to change the confirmed plan tonight.
negativeExamples.somali: Ardayga tusaalaha ahi caawa ma beddelayo qorshaha la xaqiijiyay.

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.
negativeExamples.somali: Kulanka mala-awaalka ahi ma dhammaan doono kahor afarta.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Will iyo go’aan degdeg ah ama caawimo • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The situation makes “I'll answer the phone” a natural instant decision, offer, promise, or future choice.
lines.somali: Xaaladdu waxay “I'll answer the phone” ka dhigaysaa go’aan degdeg ah, caawimo, ballanqaad ama doorasho mustaqbal oo dabiici ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Will iyo go’aan degdeg ah ama caawimo • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee instant decision iyo offer laba xaaladood oo tusaale ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Will iyo go’aan degdeg ah ama caawimo, adigoo adeegsanaya qorshe mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Will iyo go’aan degdeg ah ama caawimo, grammar-keeda, common collocations iyo sida loogu adeegsado qorshe mustaqbal oo cad.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Will iyo ballanqaadyada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Will iyo ballanqaadyada.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Will for Promises and Requests grammar
grammar.explanationSomali: Will wuxuu samayn karaa promise; Will you...? wuxuu noqon karaa request, inkastoo can/could marar badan ka edeb badan yihiin.
grammar.rule: Will wuxuu samayn karaa promise; Will you...? wuxuu noqon karaa request, inkastoo can/could marar badan ka edeb badan yihiin.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + will + verb; Will + you + verb?

negativeExamples.english: The example learner is not going to change the confirmed plan tonight.
negativeExamples.somali: Ardayga tusaalaha ahi caawa ma beddelayo qorshaha la xaqiijiyay.

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.
negativeExamples.somali: Kulanka mala-awaalka ahi ma dhammaan doono kahor afarta.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Will iyo ballanqaadyada • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The situation makes “Promise” a natural instant decision, offer, promise, or future choice.
lines.somali: Xaaladdu waxay “Promise” ka dhigaysaa go’aan degdeg ah, caawimo, ballanqaad ama doorasho mustaqbal oo dabiici ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Will iyo ballanqaadyada • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Farqiga Going To iyo Will waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Farqiga Going To iyo Will.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Farqiga Going To iyo Will
grammar.explanationSomali: Going to: qorshe hore ama evidence; will: opinion, instant decision, offer ama promise.
grammar.rule: Going to: qorshe hore ama evidence; will: opinion, instant decision, offer ama promise.
grammar.sentenceStructure: context + going to/will + base verb.

negativeExamples.english: The example learner is not going to change the confirmed plan tonight.
negativeExamples.somali: Ardayga tusaalaha ahi caawa ma beddelayo qorshaha la xaqiijiyay.

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.
negativeExamples.somali: Kulanka mala-awaalka ahi ma dhammaan doono kahor afarta.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Farqiga Going To iyo Will • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The situation makes “Previous plan” a natural instant decision, offer, promise, or future choice.
lines.somali: Xaaladdu waxay “Previous plan” ka dhigaysaa go’aan degdeg ah, caawimo, ballanqaad ama doorasho mustaqbal oo dabiici ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Farqiga Going To iyo Will • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: May, Might iyo Probably waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka May, Might iyo Probably.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: May/might + base verb waxay muujiyaan suurtagal aan la hubin; will probably saadaal xoogaa ka kalsooni badan.
grammar.rule: May/might + base verb waxay muujiyaan suurtagal aan la hubin; will probably saadaal xoogaa ka kalsooni badan.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + may/might + base verb; subject + will probably + base verb.

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: May, Might iyo Probably • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The adviser says “May travel” because the future plan is possible but not completely certain.
lines.somali: La-taliyuhu wuxuu leeyahay “May travel”, sababtoo ah qorshaha mustaqbalku waa suurtagal laakiin si buuxda looma hubo.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: May, Might iyo Probably • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Hope/plan/want/would like + to waxay sheegaan rajo ama rabitaan; wish halkan magac ahaan ayaa loo adeegsadaa.
grammar.rule: Hope/plan/want/would like + to waxay sheegaan rajo ama rabitaan; wish halkan magac ahaan ayaa loo adeegsadaa.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + hope/want/would like + to + verb.

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Rajooyinka iyo rabitaannada • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The fictional learner includes Hope in a realistic education goal for the coming year.
lines.somali: Ardayga mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu Hope ku daraa hadaf waxbarasho oo macquul ah sannadka soo socda.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Rajooyinka iyo rabitaannada • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Rajooyinka iyo rabitaannada, kuna dar future time, reason iyo confirmed detail.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Rajooyinka iyo rabitaannada, adigoo adeegsanaya qorshe mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Rajooyinka iyo rabitaannada, grammar-keeda, common collocations iyo sida loogu adeegsado qorshe mustaqbal oo cad.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Hadafyada iyo himilooyinka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Hadafyada iyo himilooyinka.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hadafyada iyo himilooyinka • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Her main goal is to complete the English course before the end of the year.
lines.somali: Hadafkeeda ugu weyn waa inay dhammaystirto koorsada English-ka kahor dhammaadka sannadka.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hadafyada iyo himilooyinka • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Hadafyada iyo himilooyinka, kuna dar future time, reason iyo confirmed detail.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Hadafyada iyo himilooyinka, adigoo adeegsanaya qorshe mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Hadafyada iyo himilooyinka, grammar-keeda, common collocations iyo sida loogu adeegsado qorshe mustaqbal oo cad.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Samaynta qorshe ficil waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Samaynta qorshe ficil.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Creating a Simple Action Plan grammar
grammar.explanationSomali: Action plan-ku wuxuu isku xiraa goal, reason, steps, dates, difficulty, solution iyo progress check.
grammar.rule: Action plan-ku wuxuu isku xiraa goal, reason, steps, dates, difficulty, solution iyo progress check.
grammar.sentenceStructure: goal + reason + dated steps + solution + progress check.

dialogues.titleSomali: Mock action plan • goal • deadline • progress check

lines.speaker: Goal
lines.english: Complete the fictional A2 programme before 30 September 2026.
lines.somali: Dhammaystir barnaamijka A2 ee mala-awaalka ah kahor 30 Sebtembar 2026.

lines.speaker: Reason
lines.english: Improve everyday English communication for study and work situations.
lines.somali: Horumari isgaarsiinta English-ka maalinlaha ah ee waxbarasho iyo shaqo.

lines.speaker: First step
lines.english: Study Unit 9 and make a weekly calendar.
lines.somali: Baro Unit 9 oo samee kalandar toddobaadle ah.

lines.speaker: Resources
lines.english: Lesson notes, saved vocabulary, and practice quizzes.
lines.somali: Qoraallada casharka, vocabulary-ga la kaydiyay iyo practice quizzes.

lines.speaker: Weekly action
lines.english: Study four lessons and review vocabulary every Friday.
lines.somali: Baro afar cashar oo vocabulary-ga dib u eeg Jimce kasta.

lines.speaker: Difficulty
lines.english: Some future forms may be difficult to separate.
lines.somali: Qaababka mustaqbalka qaarkood way adkaan karaan in la kala saaro.

lines.speaker: Solution
lines.english: Repeat the lesson and complete extra correction exercises.
lines.somali: Casharka ku celi oo samee layliyo sixid dheeraad ah.

lines.speaker: Progress check
lines.english: Complete the weekly quiz and record the score.
lines.somali: Dhammaystir quiz-ka toddobaadlaha ah oo diiwaangeli dhibcaha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Samaynta qorshe ficil • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Her main goal is to complete the English course before the end of the year.
lines.somali: Hadafkeeda ugu weyn waa inay dhammaystirto koorsada English-ka kahor dhammaadka sannadka.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Samaynta qorshe ficil • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Samaynta qorshe ficil, kuna dar future time, reason iyo confirmed detail.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor mock action plan leh goal, steps, deadline, difficulty, solution iyo progress check.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Samaynta qorshe ficil, grammar-keeda, common collocations iyo sida loogu adeegsado qorshe mustaqbal oo cad.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Kalandarka, jadwalka iyo xasuusinta waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Kalandarka, jadwalka iyo xasuusinta.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Kalandarka, jadwalka iyo xasuusinta • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The mock weekly calendar labels the Calendar clearly beside its date, time, location, and status.
lines.somali: Kalandarka toddobaadlaha ah ee tusaalaha ahi wuxuu Calendar si cad ugu qoraa taariikhda, waqtiga, goobta iyo xaaladda.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Kalandarka, jadwalka iyo xasuusinta • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Samaynta ballan waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Samaynta ballan.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Samaynta ballan • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The appointment dialogue uses “Make an appointment” while the speakers agree on or change a suitable time.
lines.somali: Wada hadalka ballantu wuxuu “Make an appointment” adeegsadaa marka dadka hadlayaa ku heshiiyaan ama beddelaan waqti ku habboon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Samaynta ballan • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Xaqiijinta iyo beddelka qorshe waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Xaqiijinta iyo beddelka qorshe.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: future-plans word or phrase • Confirming and Changing Arrangements • neutral
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The appointment dialogue uses “Postponed until Monday” while the speakers agree on or change a suitable time.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

positiveExamples.english: Please confirm the appointment before the course office closes this afternoon.
positiveExamples.somali: Fadlan xaqiiji ballanta kahor inta uusan xafiiska koorsadu xirmin galabta.

positiveExamples.english: The appointment dialogue uses “Change” while the speakers agree on or change a suitable time.
positiveExamples.somali: Wada hadalka ballantu wuxuu “Change” adeegsadaa marka dadka hadlayaa ku heshiiyaan ama beddelaan waqti ku habboon.

positiveExamples.english: The appointment dialogue uses “Reschedule” while the speakers agree on or change a suitable time.
positiveExamples.somali: Wada hadalka ballantu wuxuu “Reschedule” adeegsadaa marka dadka hadlayaa ku heshiiyaan ama beddelaan waqti ku habboon.

positiveExamples.english: We postponed the meeting until Monday because two team members were unavailable.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan kulanka dib ugu dhignay Isniinta, sababtoo ah laba xubnood oo kooxda ah ma heli karin waqtigaas.

positiveExamples.english: The appointment dialogue uses “Bring forward” while the speakers agree on or change a suitable time.
positiveExamples.somali: Wada hadalka ballantu wuxuu “Bring forward” adeegsadaa marka dadka hadlayaa ku heshiiyaan ama beddelaan waqti ku habboon.

positiveExamples.english: They cancelled the fictional trip because the road was closed after heavy rain.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxay baajiyeen safarka mala-awaalka ah, sababtoo ah waddadu way xirnayd roob culus kadib.

positiveExamples.english: Heavy rain may delay the team’s arrival until tomorrow morning.
positiveExamples.somali: Roob culus ayaa laga yaabaa inuu dib u dhigo imaanshaha kooxda ilaa berri subax.

positiveExamples.english: The fictional adviser is available between two and four on Wednesday afternoon.
positiveExamples.somali: La-taliyaha mala-awaalka ahi wuxuu bannaan yahay Arbacada galab inta u dhaxaysa labada iyo afarta.

negativeExamples.english: The example learner is not going to change the confirmed plan tonight.
negativeExamples.somali: Ardayga tusaalaha ahi caawa ma beddelayo qorshaha la xaqiijiyay.

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.
negativeExamples.somali: Kulanka mala-awaalka ahi ma dhammaan doono kahor afarta.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Xaqiijinta iyo beddelka qorshe • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Please confirm the appointment before the course office closes this afternoon.
lines.somali: Fadlan xaqiiji ballanta kahor inta uusan xafiiska koorsadu xirmin galabta.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Xaqiijinta iyo beddelka qorshe • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Sababaha iyo sharaxaadaha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Sababaha iyo sharaxaadaha.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.rule: Because + clause; because of + noun phrase; so iyo that’s why waxay muujiyaan natiijo.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sababaha iyo sharaxaadaha • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The message uses “Because” to connect a clear reason with the change to the fictional meeting.
lines.somali: Fariintu waxay “Because” u adeegsataa inay sabab cad ku xirto beddelka kulanka mala-awaalka ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Sababaha iyo sharaxaadaha • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Hordhaca First Conditional waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Hordhaca First Conditional.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: First conditional: If + Present Simple, will + base verb. Second iyo third conditional laguma darin.
grammar.rule: First conditional: If + Present Simple, will + base verb. Second iyo third conditional laguma darin.
grammar.sentenceStructure: If + Present Simple, subject + will + base verb.

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?

lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Weedhaha waqtiga ee mustaqbalka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Weedhaha waqtiga ee mustaqbalka.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Time Clauses for the Future grammar
grammar.explanationSomali: When/before/after/as soon as time clause-ka waxaa lagu isticmaalaa Present Simple, will laguma celiyo clause-ka.
grammar.rule: When/before/after/as soon as time clause-ka waxaa lagu isticmaalaa Present Simple, will laguma celiyo clause-ka.
grammar.sentenceStructure: main clause with will + time word + Present Simple clause.

negativeExamples.english: The example learner is not going to change the confirmed plan tonight.
negativeExamples.somali: Ardayga tusaalaha ahi caawa ma beddelayo qorshaha la xaqiijiyay.

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.
negativeExamples.somali: Kulanka mala-awaalka ahi ma dhammaan doono kahor afarta.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Weedhaha waqtiga ee mustaqbalka • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The future time clause uses “When” with Present Simple instead of adding will twice.
lines.somali: Time clause-ka mustaqbalku wuxuu “When” la adeegsadaa Present Simple halkii will laba jeer laga dhigi lahaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Weedhaha waqtiga ee mustaqbalka • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Isbeddellada nolosha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Isbeddellada nolosha.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Isbeddellada nolosha • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The example person plans to Start a course after completing a fictional training programme.
lines.somali: Qofka tusaalaha ahi wuxuu qorshaynayaa inuu Start a course kadib marka uu dhammaystiro barnaamij tababar oo mala-awaal ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Isbeddellada nolosha • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Ka hadalka waxbarashada mustaqbalka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Ka hadalka waxbarashada mustaqbalka.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka waxbarashada mustaqbalka • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The example person plans to Continue studying after completing a fictional training programme.
lines.somali: Qofka tusaalaha ahi wuxuu qorshaynayaa inuu Continue studying kadib marka uu dhammaystiro barnaamij tababar oo mala-awaal ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka waxbarashada mustaqbalka • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Ka hadalka shaqada mustaqbalka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Ka hadalka shaqada mustaqbalka.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka shaqada mustaqbalka • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The example person plans to Apply for a job after completing a fictional training programme.
lines.somali: Qofka tusaalaha ahi wuxuu qorshaynayaa inuu Apply for a job kadib marka uu dhammaystiro barnaamij tababar oo mala-awaal ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Ka hadalka shaqada mustaqbalka • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Saadaalaha nolosha maalinlaha ah • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The prediction says Education may change gradually, rather than presenting the idea as a certain fact.
lines.somali: Saadaashu waxay sheegaysaa in Education laga yaabo inuu tartiib isu beddelo, mana soo bandhigayso xaqiiqo la hubo.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Saadaalaha nolosha maalinlaha ah • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play A2 ah oo ku saabsan Saadaalaha nolosha maalinlaha ah, kuna dar future time, reason iyo confirmed detail.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6–10 jumladood oo ku saabsan Saadaalaha nolosha maalinlaha ah, adigoo adeegsanaya qorshe mala-awaal ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad casharkan ku baratay Saadaalaha nolosha maalinlaha ah, grammar-keeda, common collocations iyo sida loogu adeegsado qorshe mustaqbal oo cad.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qorista fariin qorshe mustaqbal waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Qorista fariin qorshe mustaqbal.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

negativeExamples.english: The example learner is not going to change the confirmed plan tonight.
negativeExamples.somali: Ardayga tusaalaha ahi caawa ma beddelayo qorshaha la xaqiijiyay.

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.
negativeExamples.somali: Kulanka mala-awaalka ahi ma dhammaan doono kahor afarta.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Future-plan message • full writing model

lines.speaker: Hodan
lines.english: Hello Ahmed, We are meeting at the fictional training centre on Wednesday at ten o’clock to discuss next month’s course. Please bring your registration form. Let me know if you are unable to attend. Thank you, Hodan.
lines.somali: Salaan Ahmed, Waxaan xarunta tababarka ee mala-awaalka ah ku kulmaynaa Arbacada tobanka si aan uga hadalno koorsada bisha dambe. Fadlan foomka diiwaangelinta keen. Ii soo sheeg haddii aadan iman karin. Mahadsanid, Hodan.

lines.speaker: Ahmed
lines.english: Thank you. I will confirm the appointment this afternoon.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Ballanta waxaan xaqiijin doonaa galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista fariin qorshe mustaqbal • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The writing model includes a clear Greeting so the reader can understand the fictional future plan.
lines.somali: Qaabka qoraalku wuxuu leeyahay Greeting cad si akhristuhu u fahmo qorshaha mustaqbal ee mala-awaalka ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista fariin qorshe mustaqbal • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qorista hadafyada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Qorista hadafyada.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Goal paragraph • 140–190 words • model

lines.speaker: Writer
lines.english: My main fictional goal is to improve my English communication before the end of this year. I chose this goal because I would like to speak more clearly in study and workplace situations. I am going to study for thirty minutes on five days each week. On Monday and Wednesday, I will review vocabulary and write short example sentences. On Tuesday, I am meeting an example study partner online to practise speaking. I will listen to a short conversation on Thursday, and Friday will be my progress-check day. If I find a grammar topic difficult, I will repeat the lesson and complete extra exercises before moving forward. A possible problem is missing study time during a busy week. To solve this, I will use two shorter fifteen-minute sessions. I have added each activity to a mock calendar, and I will record every completed lesson. I hope to finish A2 by December. If I follow the plan regularly, I will understand future conversations better and feel more confident when I speak.
lines.somali: Hadafkayga mala-awaalka ahi waa inaan horumariyo isgaarsiinta English-ka kahor dhammaadka sannadkan. Shan maalmood toddobaadkii ayaan soddon daqiiqo baranayaa. Haddii grammar igu adkaado, casharka ayaan ku celinayaa. Haddii toddobaadku mashquul noqdo, laba qaybood oo shan iyo toban daqiiqo ah ayaan samaynayaa. Waxaan rajaynayaa inaan A2 dhammaystiro Diseembar.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What is the goal, possible problem, and solution?
lines.somali: Waa maxay hadafka, dhibaatada suurtagalka ah iyo xalku?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: Improve communication; a busy week; use two shorter study sessions.
lines.somali: Horumari isgaarsiinta; toddobaad mashquul ah; isticmaal laba waqti oo gaaban.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista hadafyada • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The writing model includes a clear Main goal so the reader can understand the fictional future plan.
lines.somali: Qaabka qoraalku wuxuu leeyahay Main goal cad si akhristuhu u fahmo qorshaha mustaqbal ee mala-awaalka ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista hadafyada • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Akhrinta qoraal qorshe mustaqbal waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Akhrinta qoraal qorshe mustaqbal.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.
