dialogues.titleSomali: Abdi’s six-month plan • 200–280 words • reading

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.english: Abdi has made a fictional plan for the next six months. He is going to complete an evening computer course while continuing his English studies. The computer course starts on 5 August, and he is meeting the course adviser at ten o’clock next Tuesday. He has already prepared the application form, but he will check it once more before he submits it. On Mondays and Wednesdays, Abdi is attending classes at the training centre. He plans to review English vocabulary for twenty minutes after each class. He may also take a small weekend job, although he has not made a final decision. If the work schedule fits his course timetable, he will accept the position. If it does not fit, he will wait for another opportunity. In October, Abdi is going to take the course assessment. He thinks the practical tasks will be useful, but he knows some lessons might be difficult. As soon as he receives feedback, he will update his action plan. His long-term goal is to develop computer and communication skills before applying for an office position next year. He will probably need more training, so he is saving a small amount each month. Abdi understands that plans can change. If an appointment is postponed or a class is cancelled, he will use the free time to revise. His plan is realistic because every activity has a date, a reason, and a possible alternative.
lines.somali: Abdi wuxuu sameeyay qorshe mala-awaal ah oo lix bilood ah. Wuxuu dhammaystirayaa koorso kombiyuutar fiidkii ah, isagoo sii wada English-ka. Talaadada dambe wuxuu la kulmayaa la-taliyaha koorsada. Haddii jadwalka shaqada dhammaadka toddobaadku ku habboonaado koorsada, wuu aqbalayaa. Marka uu feedback helo, action plan-kiisa ayuu cusboonaysiinayaa. Hadafkiisa fog waa inuu horumariyo xirfadaha kombiyuutarka iyo isgaarsiinta.

lines.speaker: Question
lines.english: What is confirmed for next Tuesday?
lines.somali: Maxaa la xaqiijiyay Talaadada dambe?

lines.speaker: Answer
lines.english: Abdi is meeting the course adviser at ten o’clock.
lines.somali: Abdi wuxuu la kulmayaa la-taliyaha koorsada tobanka.

lines.speaker: Language
lines.english: “Is going to complete” is a plan; “is meeting” is confirmed; “will accept” is a conditional result.
lines.somali: “Is going to complete” waa qorshe; “is meeting” waa arrangement; “will accept” waa natiijo conditional.

dialogues.titleSomali: Akhrinta qoraal qorshe mustaqbal • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The future-plans reading uses Study plan to explain the learner’s next practical step.
lines.somali: Qoraalka qorshaha mustaqbalku wuxuu Study plan u adeegsadaa inuu sharxo tallaabada xigta ee ardayga.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Akhrinta qoraal qorshe mustaqbal • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Wada sheekeysiyada qorshaha mustaqbalka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Wada sheekeysiyada qorshaha mustaqbalka.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu vocabulary-ga ku xiriirinayaa future plans, arrangements iyo goals heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo; plan, arrangement iyo prediction kala saar.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + future form + base verb + clear future detail.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples mustaqbal oo dabiici ah, grammar A2 iyo practice kala duwan.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo phrases-ka Khaladaadka caadiga ah.
Adeegso qaabka mustaqbalka ee context-ku caddeynayo.
Samee speaking iyo writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog mala-awaal ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu saxayaa going to, will, arrangements, first conditional, time clauses iyo because/because of.
grammar.rule: Casharku wuxuu saxayaa going to, will, arrangements, first conditional, time clauses iyo because/because of.
grammar.sentenceStructure: correct future form + clear context.

questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The correction task presents “Am going to study” as the natural future form in a clear context.
lines.somali: Layliga sixiddu wuxuu “Am going to study” u soo bandhigayaa qaabka mustaqbal ee dabiiciga ah xaalad cad gudaheeda.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The example learner is not going to change the confirmed plan tonight.
negativeExamples.somali: Ardayga tusaalaha ahi caawa ma beddelayo qorshaha la xaqiijiyay.

negativeExamples.english: The fictional meeting will not finish before four o’clock.
negativeExamples.somali: Kulanka mala-awaalka ahi ma dhammaan doono kahor afarta.

questionExamples.english: Are you going to review the lesson tomorrow?
questionExamples.somali: Ma qorshaynaysaa inaad casharka berri dib u eegto?

questionExamples.english: Will you confirm the fictional appointment today?
questionExamples.somali: Maanta ma xaqiijin doontaa ballanta mala-awaalka ah?

commonMistakesSomali: Going to iyo will waxaa ka dambeeya base verb.
Arrangement la xaqiijiyay waxaa si dabiici ah loogu isticmaalaa Present Continuous.
If/time clause-ka bartilmaameedka ah will ha gelin.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 9 • plan • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: What are you planning to do in this fictional situation?
lines.somali: Maxaad qorshaynaysaa inaad ka samayso xaaladdan mala-awaalka ah?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The Unit 9 review connects Future-time review with a practical future-plans communication task.
lines.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 9 waxay Future-time review ku xiraysaa hawl isgaarsiin oo qorshe mustaqbal ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Is the time confirmed, or is it still a general plan?
lines.somali: Waqtigu ma la xaqiijiyay, mise weli waa qorshe guud?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The time is confirmed, so I have added it to the example calendar.
lines.somali: Waqtiga waa la xaqiijiyay, sidaas darteed waxaan ku daray kalandarka tusaalaha ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 9 • change • best response • speaking

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I’m afraid the fictional meeting time has changed.
lines.somali: Waxaan ka xumahay waqtigii kulanka mala-awaalka ahaa wuu isbeddelay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Could we reschedule it for Thursday afternoon?
lines.somali: Ma u beddeli karnaa Khamiista galab?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Yes, I’ll check the calendar and confirm it now.
lines.somali: Haa, kalandarka ayaan hubinayaa oo hadda xaqiijinayaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will update my weekly plan.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Waxaan cusboonaysiin doonaa qorshahayga toddobaadlaha ah.
